entry: Marking the book: Despite win rate dipped to 20% over the last day, the drop×bounce lab found a -1.881%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 5.0%, and regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting. We're playing for data, not dollars, and the data keeps getting cleaner.
good_signals: the drop×bounce lab found a -1.881%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 5.0%
regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting

what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
